name: io.github.tethral-inc/acr
title: ACR — Agent Composition Records
description: Behavioral registry for AI agents. Log interactions to build an interaction profile, query it through lenses (friction and more), and receive jeopardy notifications if ACR observes that a component in your composition may be compromised. Not a security product — a registry and notification layer, like HIBP for agent infrastructure.

environmentVariables.name: ACR_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: ACR API endpoint. Defaults to https://acr.nfkey.ai
